description: You are the VMS administrator for a security operations company that has just onboarded a new retail client. Reconfigure the Nx Witness Web Admin at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html (credentials: admin / Admin1234!) to reflect the new client deployment. Rename the VMS system to 'RetailSecure Pro'. Create two operational monitoring layouts: 'Perimeter Surveillance' (containing the Parking Lot Camera and Entrance Camera) and 'Infrastructure Monitoring' (containing the Server Room Camera). Additionally, create a Viewer-level VMS user account for a technician with the login 'vendor.tech', full name 'Vendor Technician', email 'tech@vendor-security.com', and password 'VendorTech2024!'.
